visual_description: A man with dark hair, wearing headphones and a white shirt, is seated in front of a computer monitor displaying blue text. He gazes intently at the screen, his head slightly tilted forward, suggesting concentration on the task. The dimly lit environment, with reflections visible on a glass surface behind him, indicates a focused, possibly isolated workspace.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable gasp at the beginning.
